title: Webhook registration + HMAC delivery
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/signals/webhooks: registers webhook URL + events + secret for key
Stores webhook_url and webhook_secret_hash in signals_api_keys
Webhook delivery: POST to registered URL with X-Signal-Signature HMAC header
Retry logic: 3 attempts with exponential backoff (1s, 5s, 30s)
Only Enterprise tier can register webhooks (403 for others)
